mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_COLLECT_EXCLUDE ( COLLECT_EXCLUDE_ID, SERVER_ID, SERVER_IP, SOURCE_FILE_PATH, EXCLUDE_REASON, EXCLUDE_FILE_SIZE, EXCLUDE_DETAIL, RESTORE_YN, RESTORE_AT, RESTORE_MEMO, EXCLUDE_DATE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{collectExcludeId}, #{serverId}, #{serverIp}, #{sourceFilePath}, #{excludeReason}, #{excludeFileSize}, #{excludeDetail}, COALESCE(#{restoreYn}, 'N'), #{restoreAt}, #{restoreMemo}, #{excludeDate}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
